author: y4rr
content:
Landed GPU dispatch for matrix_norm (Frobenius). The other three (det / inv / pinv) need GPU-resident LU or SVD which is already scoped under #604, so I'm folding them in there rather than duplicating.

## Landed
- \`linalg::matrix_norm\` GPU path: \`mul → reduce_sum → sqrt\` via existing \`GpuBackend\` trait methods. Three kernel launches but fully GPU-resident — no host bounce. Returns a 0-d device tensor.
- 5 integration tests in \`ferrotorch-gpu/tests/test_gpu_matrix_norm.rs\` covering f32/f64, square/rectangular, zero matrix, non-2D rejection. All pass.

## Folded into #604
- det → needs LU (getrf) on GPU; det = sign(P) · prod(diag(U)). Trivial once LU is GPU-resident.
- inv → also needs LU; A⁻¹ = LU\\I via getrs.
- pinv → needs GPU-resident SVD without host bounce; pinv = V · diag(1/s_thresh) · Uᵀ via cuBLAS GEMM.

Closing in favor of #604 for the LU/SVD-dependent ops.
